summary: Current House: 213 D vs 219 R with 3 vacancies. MTG resigned Jan 5, 2026. Gap of 6 seats in seated members.
content:
As of January 5, 2026: 213 Democrats, 219 Republicans, 3 vacant seats.

Vacancies:
1. TX-18 (D seat, Turner died March 5 2025) - runoff Jan 31, 2026 (likely D)
2. NJ-11 (D seat, Sherrill resigned Nov 20 2025) - special April 16, 2026 (likely D)
3. GA-14 (R seat, MTG resigned Jan 5 2026) - special TBD (likely R)

Full effective count: ~215 D vs ~220 R = 5-seat margin
All vacancies filled by same party throughout 2025. No flips occurred.
Republican majority maintained at ~5-7 seats throughout 119th Congress.

CP was ~60% in Feb 2025 when margin was only 3 seats (218-215).
Since then margin widened slightly, probability of D control should have dropped significantly.
